# CCAvenue API Docs

> Merchant's API Implementation Guide for the CCAvenue payment gateway. Covers authentication, request/response encryption, and the full set of server-to-server API calls for managing orders, customer payment options, invoices, and settlements.

## Guide

- [API Authentication](https://nermalcat69.github.io/ccavenue.github.io/guide/authentication): Merchant credentials, IP whitelisting, and the full list of supported API calls.
- [Encryption & Decryption](https://nermalcat69.github.io/ccavenue.github.io/guide/encryption-decryption): How to encrypt requests and decrypt responses using AES.
- [Error Codes](https://nermalcat69.github.io/ccavenue.github.io/guide/error-codes): Full reference table of API error codes and their meanings.

## Order Management

- [Confirm](https://nermalcat69.github.io/ccavenue.github.io/api/confirm): Confirm a pending order for settlement.
- [Cancel](https://nermalcat69.github.io/ccavenue.github.io/api/cancel): Cancel a pending order.
- [Refund](https://nermalcat69.github.io/ccavenue.github.io/api/refund): Refund a previously executed order/transaction.
- [Status](https://nermalcat69.github.io/ccavenue.github.io/api/status): Look up the status of a transaction/order.
- [Order Lookup](https://nermalcat69.github.io/ccavenue.github.io/api/order-lookup): Search transactions/orders by criteria.
- [Pending Orders](https://nermalcat69.github.io/ccavenue.github.io/api/pending-orders): List transactions awaiting confirmation or cancellation.
- [Update Billing Details](https://nermalcat69.github.io/ccavenue.github.io/api/update-billing-details): Update customer billing information for an order.
- [Update Merchant Param](https://nermalcat69.github.io/ccavenue.github.io/api/update-merchant-param): Add extra merchant parameters against a reference number.

## Customer & Payment Options

- [Delete Customer](https://nermalcat69.github.io/ccavenue.github.io/api/delete-customer): Delete all saved payment options for a customer.
- [Delete Customer Payment Option](https://nermalcat69.github.io/ccavenue.github.io/api/delete-customer-payment-option): Delete a specific saved payment option.
- [Add Customer Payment Option](https://nermalcat69.github.io/ccavenue.github.io/api/add-customer-payment-option): Add another payment option for a registered customer.
- [Get Customer Payment Option](https://nermalcat69.github.io/ccavenue.github.io/api/get-customer-payment-option): List payment options saved for a customer.

## Invoicing

- [Generate Invoice](https://nermalcat69.github.io/ccavenue.github.io/api/generate-invoice): Generate an invoice for a customer.
- [Generate Recurring Invoice](https://nermalcat69.github.io/ccavenue.github.io/api/generate-recurring-invoice): Generate a recurring invoice for a customer.
- [Generate Quick Invoice](https://nermalcat69.github.io/ccavenue.github.io/api/generate-quick-invoice): Generate a simplified quick invoice.
- [Get Item List](https://nermalcat69.github.io/ccavenue.github.io/api/get-item-list): List configured items and tasks used in invoices.
- [Invoice Lookup](https://nermalcat69.github.io/ccavenue.github.io/api/invoice-lookup): Find invoice/order lookup details.
- [Update Merchant Invoice Reference No](https://nermalcat69.github.io/ccavenue.github.io/api/update-merchant-invoice-reference-no): Update the invoice reference number after generation.

## Settlements & Payouts

- [Bin Details](https://nermalcat69.github.io/ccavenue.github.io/api/bin-details): Fetch card details for a BIN number.
- [PayId Details](https://nermalcat69.github.io/ccavenue.github.io/api/payid-details): List transactions for a given PayId.
- [Payouts Summary](https://nermalcat69.github.io/ccavenue.github.io/api/payouts-summary): List payout summary for a settlement date.
- [Get Refund Details](https://nermalcat69.github.io/ccavenue.github.io/api/get-refund-details): Fetch refund information for a transaction.
- [Get Settlement Details](https://nermalcat69.github.io/ccavenue.github.io/api/get-settlement-details): Fetch settlement details such as PayId and UTR number.
- [Consolidate Payout Summary](https://nermalcat69.github.io/ccavenue.github.io/api/consolidate-payout-summary): List consolidated payout summary for a settlement date.
- [Consolidate Settlement Details](https://nermalcat69.github.io/ccavenue.github.io/api/consolidate-settlement-details): List consolidated settlement details for an order/reference number.
